waypoints.note: Pre-jump: aboard C-47 serials forming over the south coast of England. Position approximates the IX TCC route start.

disputedBy.claim: Beevor and post-war analyses note that 82nd Airborne stick drops were heavily dispersed: pathfinder beacons mis-set and cloud over the Cotentin caused many sticks to drop kilometers off-DZ. The 'on-DZ' centroid is therefore an idealization, not where most sticks actually landed.

waypoints.note: First sticks (505th PIR) over DZ-O (Sainte-Mère-Église). Position is the planned DZ-O centroid; actual stick footprints scattered widely.
Sainte-Mère-Église taken by 3/505 PIR (Krause); first French town liberated.
Holding Sainte-Mère-Église; 507th and 508th rallying west of the Merderet against scattered German counterattacks (91st Luftlande).
Mid-day: Merderet causeways (La Fière, Chef-du-Pont) contested; partial linkup with 4th ID elements pushing west from Utah.
End of MVP window: Sainte-Mère-Église held; western Cotentin still tenuous. Division centroid approximate.
